news_metadata.title: 测试：高端光刻机关键部件交付延迟，芯片产线扩产节奏放缓
news_metadata.content: 受精密光学模组与高功率激光子系统交付周期拉长影响，某晶圆厂新一批高端光刻机安装计划出现延期。设备供应商与系统集成商正在协调分批到货与现场并行调试方案，以降低对先进制程产线爬坡的影响。业内预计，短期内相关芯片制造环节的设备利用率与交付节奏将出现波动。

level1.reason: 光刻机是半导体制造用高端工业设备，不属于任何所列农产品或初级加工品大类

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: Photolithography machines are semiconductor manufacturing equipment used in microelectronics, closely tied to communications hardware production.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Segment匹配置信度0.60，低于阈值

level1.reason: 精密光学模组属于高科技光电设备部件，不在所列农业、食品、动植物等初级或传统加工产品大类中

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: Precision optical modules are commonly used in photography, imaging, and audio-visual equipment such as cameras, projectors, and optical sensors.

family.reason: 精密光学模组 refers to precision optical modules, which fall under optics used in photography and imaging applications.

class.reason: Precision optical module is a core component in optics, involving lenses, mirrors, and optical alignment systems.

brick.reason: 精密光学模组 (precision optical modules) typically refers to integrated optical components or subsystems used in larger systems, aligning best with replacement parts/accessories rather than end-user devices like binoculars or microscopes.

level1.reason: 高功率激光子系统属于高科技工业设备，不在所列农业、食品、动植物产品等HS Level 1大类范围内

segment.reason: High-power laser subsystems are specialized electrical components used in industrial, scientific, or medical equipment, falling under broad electrical supply categorization.

family.reason: High-power laser subsystem is not covered by any of the given electrical/cabling/hardware categories; it belongs to optoelectronics or laser systems, outside the candidate scope.
